offer: For accounting firms managing 10–20 vendor invoices/month, delayed reporting causes late payments. We automate report generation and emailing instead of manual compilation of reports and email reminders.
problem: delayed vendor payments due to lack of timely aging reports
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools discussions
try_it: Let users try email notifications and user-friendly dashboard for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video of the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant community
